---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new agent, command, template, or domain extension
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve

<the user-facing problem — what does the framework not do today that you want it to do>

## Proposed approach

<rough sketch of the agent / command / template you'd add. File path, scope, anything you've already thought through.>

## Why this fits the framework

The framework is deliberately constrained: native search only, key-free, multi-agent orchestrator-subagents pattern. Briefly note how your idea fits these constraints — or argue why an exception is warranted.

## Alternatives considered

<existing tools, workarounds, or other approaches you considered. Anything that already partially solves this?>

## Willing to PR?

- [ ] Yes, I can implement this
- [ ] Maybe, with guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting
